# Autonomous Learning Spec

DECISION: First verify, then learn.
DECISION: Source spans are required before a claim can become training data.
DECISION: Pending candidates are excluded from training.
DECISION: Rejected candidates are excluded from training.
DECISION: Inferred-only candidates are excluded from training.
DECISION: Secrets and ignored files are excluded from datasets.
DECISION: Evaluation must pass before adapter activation.
DECISION: Rollback is required before production adapter use.
OUTDATED: Morpheus trains directly on raw markdown.
OUTDATED: Morpheus is mainly a LoRA trainer.
